name: Can insurance lawyers in Chicago subpoena my Google AI legal questions from my accident?
description: Yes, subpoenable and unprotected—avoid AI for case details.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can insurance lawyers in Chicago subpoena my Google AI legal questions from my accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, subpoenable and unprotected—avoid AI for case details.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, AI conversation records are potentially discoverable in discovery.[1] Courts treat them as non-privileged data, especially if inconsistent with your claims.[1] Key factors: no privilege without attorney involvement; AI providers may retain logs; used to challenge credibility.[1] Document everything traditionally; never input case details to AI; hire counsel experienced in e-discovery.[1] Preserve paper trails over digital speculation.
